title: Fandom Overlay: uBlock Origin Edition
description: Turn the pumpkin overlay into Fandom! - Now with ads blocked!
body:
## Turn the pumpkin overlay into Fandom! - Now with ads blocked!
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/fandom-overlay-ublock-origin-edition)




Everyone loves the Fandom Minecraft Wiki! This pack allows users to experience its amazing web design from within Minecraft itself! To experience this, simply don a carved pumpkin, and have your view transformed into the wonders that is the Fandom Minecraft Wiki!


![](https://i.imgur.com/vRHzUJp.gif) ## With ads removed:
